name: Nudge
description: Periodic self-reflection nudges via agent_end hook. Inspired by Hermes agent's background review mechanism.

interval.description: Trigger a nudge every N agent turns (default: 10)

promptFile.description: Path to a file containing the nudge prompt (relative to workspace). Default: NUDGE.md

mode.description: How to trigger reflection. Currently only 'system-event' is implemented (injects nudge into main session).

skipTriggers.description: Skip nudge when agent run was initiated by these triggers (default: ["heartbeat", "cron"])
